description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, this high ankle suede shoe from ganuchi is a great buy. Slip into it barefoot and pair it with capris and stylish t-shirts for unparalleled cool.UpperSuede upper with stitch detailing on the midfoot Fabric inner lining for breathable comfortLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with terraced lugs and a midfoot pivot pint with ridges for absolute grip and tractionShoe careRemove dust and dirt using a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
